title: Add rate limit check utility
description: Create checkRateLimit(key: string, maxRequests: number, windowMs: number): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter?: number } in src/auth/rate-limiter-utils.ts using an in-memory Map. Include co-located tests.

existing_patterns.description: Single-function utility module with co-located .test.ts file pattern
In-memory Map-based rate limiting with sliding window algorithm
Utility function with typed options interface and clean error handling
